# Milestones

Create these GitHub milestones when repository administration is available:

- `0.4.0`: Adapter registry, PixiJS, Canvas, MCP metadata, agent init, recipe substrate.
- `0.5.0`: Contributor scaffold, fixture capture, report export/gallery, stronger failure guidance.
- `0.6.1`: Context handoff, install-agent dry-run, LLM reference docs, audio/atlas/UI metadata helpers, runtime smoke availability checks.
- `0.7.3`: Additional media install/verify/report/rollback pipeline for audio, atlas/tileset, and UI.
- `0.8.0`: Unity target support, C# manifests/helpers, Unity wire maps, readiness checks, and fixture coverage.
- `0.8.2`: Three.js target support, TypeScript texture/sprite/plane helpers, Three.js wire maps, readiness checks, and fixture coverage.

The local implementation has reached the `0.8.2` Three.js Support surface. Future milestones should be created for runtime execution, external example repositories, and optional hosted/pack distribution surfaces.
